hyperedges.name: slice2_oauth_repo_flow
hyperedges.description: OAuth repo-scope token persistence + 401-driven reauth flow

nodes.label: Stub `introspect_via_github` imported into the routes module.      Default: retu
nodes.norm_label: stub `introspect_via_github` imported into the routes module.      default: retu

nodes.label: Non-401 introspection failures must not block the connection.
nodes.norm_label: non-401 introspection failures must not block the connection.

nodes.label: Two users connecting the same github_repo_id must both succeed.     Previously b
nodes.norm_label: two users connecting the same github_repo_id must both succeed.     previously b

nodes.norm_label: user overrides must survive a re-introspect — only `detected` is refreshed.

nodes.norm_label: send the user to the github oauth-app settings page where they can grant     or

nodes.norm_label: run introspection against github and persist on `doc`.      `githubreauthrequire

nodes.norm_label: pick the primary language by counting recognised file extensions.
